title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses infrastructure scaling at Shopify, database market cycles where new entrants emerge every 15 years, and engineering practices for hiring top talent. The conversation covers AI coding limitations, flash sale infrastructure challenges, and the evolving role of databases in the AI era.
